title: AI providers
apiKeyRetained: Leave blank to retain the saved key
realApiOptional: Configure OpenAI for meeting processing. Test providers are hidden in public release builds.
configurationRequired: Set up this provider before using it.
configured: Configured. Secrets are stored in the encrypted local vault.
desktopOnlyCredentials: Provider credentials are available only in the secure desktop app.
openAiDescription: Use the official OpenAI provider. AccordMesh manages the endpoint and task-model defaults.
capabilitiesDescription: Available features depend on the provider and are checked before processing starts.
removeDialogDescription: This removes the saved settings and encrypted credential from this device.
mockDescription: Deterministic local test provider for development, offline QA, and API-token cost control.
apiKeySecurityDescription: Saved keys are encrypted in the local vault and never shown again.
savedSecretNeverShown: For security, the saved key cannot be displayed. Enter a new key only when you want to replace it.
apiKeyReplaceHint: Leave this blank to keep the saved key. Enter a new value to replace it when you save.
apiKeyAddHint: The key is sent directly to the encrypted local vault and cleared from this page after saving.
modelAssignmentsDescription: Shows which model AccordMesh uses for each task.
deleteApiKeyDialogDescription: The encrypted key will be removed. Endpoint and model settings will remain, but OpenAI processing will stay unavailable until you save a new key.
credentialsSaveFailed: Provider settings could not be saved. Check the API key and try again.
apiKeyRemoveFailed: API key could not be deleted.
configurationRemoveFailed: Provider settings could not be removed.
configuredNotVerified: Saved on this device. AccordMesh has not verified the connection or API key.

errorGuidance.authentication: Review or replace the encrypted credential. The provider may also be denying access to the selected model or capability.
errorGuidance.configuration: Review the saved endpoint and required settings before trying again.
errorGuidance.rate_limit: Check provider usage limits and account availability, then retry the failed run from the meeting History page.
errorGuidance.network: Check connectivity and provider availability, then retry the failed run from the meeting History page.
errorGuidance.model: Review the configured model name and whether the provider supports this action, then retry from History.
errorGuidance.response_format: The provider response was rejected safely because its format was not usable. Review the model and retry from History.

officialEndpointTitle: Official OpenAI endpoint managed by AccordMesh
officialEndpointDescription: AccordMesh uses https://api.openai.com/v1 and the documented task-model defaults for the OpenAI provider. Custom or OpenAI-compatible endpoints will be handled as a separate provider type in a future release.
developerDiagnosticsNotice: Developer diagnostics are available only when VITE_ACCORDMESH_ENABLE_DEV_TOOLS=1 is set.
legacyCustomEndpointNotice: This vault contains a legacy custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. It will remain available for existing processing until you replace the OpenAI key or remove the configuration. Future custom endpoints will be managed by a separate provider type.

testAdapter.description: UI extension test only. This adapter verifies provider registration, task model display, and capability rendering. It does not process meetings.
testAdapter.uiOnlyNotice: This adapter is visible only in Developer diagnostics mode. It is for UI extension testing and fails closed for real meeting processing.

activeProviderDescription: Choose which provider definition to inspect on this page. Public release builds show only production providers.
providerAdapterGenericDescription: Provider adapter registered for this build.
mockDeveloperOnlyNotice: MockProvider is visible only in Developer diagnostics mode. Use the Developer diagnostics page to choose deterministic scenarios for offline QA.
